name: Cumbre Vieja
eruptionHistory: The 2021 eruption on La Palma lasted 85 days and destroyed over 2,900 buildings. Lava flows reached the sea creating new land. Previous eruptions in 1971 and 1949.
description: The 2021 eruption of Cumbre Vieja on La Palma was the most destructive volcanic eruption in the Canary Islands' history, displacing thousands and burying homes, farms, and infrastructure under lava.
